enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kannan Vanthu?

The song captures a romantic and soothing theme, expressing love and longing.

Who are the singers of Kannan Vanthu?

The song is sung by K.S. Chitra and P. Jayachandran.

Who composed the music for Rettai Vaal Kuruvi?

The music was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

What is the release year of the song?

The song was released in 1987.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song is set in a romantic context, highlighting the emotions of love and connection between the characters.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kannan Vanthu is a beautiful romantic melody from the movie Rettai Vaal Kuruvi, released in 1987. The song, composed by Ilaiyaraaja, features the enchanting voices of K.S. Chitra and P. Jayachandran, bringing to life the poetic lyrics of Gangai Amaran. It conveys a deep sense of love and longing, capturing the essence of romance with its soothing melody. The song evokes nostalgia and is perfect for moments of reflection and relaxation, making it a timeless classic in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kannan Vanthu from the movie Rettai Vaal Kuruvi is a timeless melody that captures the essence of romance and nostalgia. With the magical composition of Ilaiyaraaja and the soulful voices of K.S. Chitra and P. Jayachandran, this song transports listeners to a world of love and serenity. Experience the enchanting lyrics by Gangai Amaran that beautifully narrate a tale of affection and longing.
stanzaMeanings: Kannan comes and sings all the time. He asked why there is anger in the eyes when love is spoken. The flute sound speaks in the breeze on the flower stage.
Kannan comes and sings all the time. He asked why there is anger in the eyes when love is spoken.
Songs flow and eyes close, colorful feet sing.
Desires are on Kannan's chariot, thirsts flow in the joy stone.
In the place called love, the sweet bird coos.
This colorful flag searches for a sign, shining cheeks sing harmony, seeking closeness, did heavens bloom?
Kannan comes and sings all the time.
In the sky, dear Kannan will sing. In the song, a little girl will dance.
Like the sound of cowherds, it's time for joyful kisses to flow.
Evening moon, the evening moon has bloomed, the silent language speaks.
In a flower at dusk, honey drips, the bee speaks, the breeze blows, Kannan sings, eyes close, cheeks turn red.
Kannan comes and sings all the time. He asked why there is anger in the eyes when love is spoken. The flute sound speaks in the breeze on the flower stage.
Kannan comes and sings all the time. He asked why there is anger in the eyes when love is spoken.
